accessibility.plain_language_summary: The repeated protocol shows consistent stage structure with metric-specific PT movement toward Mall, away from Mall, or unchanged; no universal return claim is made.
accessibility.screen_reader_summary: Four accepted dates are shown as three-stage Mall Skate, Walk, and PT Skate profiles. Metric-specific directions remain mixed and reciprocal CSS rows are omitted from the default view.

accepted_protocols.unequal_distance_disclosure: Mall, walking, and PT stages retain their source-supplied unequal distances; equal exposure is not assumed.

protocol.description: controlled skating after the walking stage
protocol.label: PT Skate

limitations: Wearables estimate physiologic, autonomic, MSK, movement, impact, and transport burden. They do not directly measure pain. Results are within-person evidence, not clinical proof, diagnosis, causation, universal proof, or legal proof.

source_labels: Accepted Mall → Walk → PT Skate protocol
